name: @arvoretech/pi-secret-firewall
description_en: Redacts secrets (env vars, .env files, token patterns) from the model context and tool outputs, exposing them only as $SECRET_* shell env vars the model can reference but never read
description_zh: 从模型上下文和工具输出中删除密钥（环境变量、.env文件、令牌模式），仅将它们作为$SECRET_* shell环境变量暴露，模型可以引用但无法读取
